response.justification: While Bogdan meets the basic education and experience timeline requirements (Bachelor's + 13 years), his background is entirely in full-stack software development with zero demonstrated expertise in the core competencies required for this principal-level role: SoC/IP modeling, GPU/AI accelerator architecture optimization, hardware-software co-design, and deep learning workload analysis. His performance optimization experience is limited to software-level concerns (caching, async I/O, pricing algorithms), not the microarchitecture and hardware design focus essential for this position.
strengths: 13+ years of technical experience meeting baseline timeline requirements
Proven ability to optimize low-latency, high-performance systems at scale (millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby)
Strong software craftsmanship foundation with experience across multiple languages and domains
concerns: No experience with SoC design, IP modeling, or hardware architecture—fundamental required competencies
No background in GPU architecture, AI accelerator optimization, or neural network workload analysis
Career is purely software-centric (web, backend, mobile, DevOps); lacks hardware-software co-design and systems-level architecture work

key_factors.factor: Missing SoC/IP modeling and hardware architecture expertise
No AI accelerator or deep learning optimization background
